assertions.assertion: Lists all four signing behaviors: SignAssertion, SignResponse, SignBoth, DoNotSign
assertions.rationale: Lists conceptual signing options but uses wrong enum names (e.g., 'SignAssertionAndResponse' instead of 'SignBoth', 'No Signing' instead of 'DoNotSign'). Does not use the correct Duende enum values.

assertions.assertion: Recommends SignBoth for the specific requirement of signing both assertion and response
Notes that SignAssertion is the default and most interoperable option
assertions.rationale: States 'Signing the assertion is the default and most commonly used option'.

assertions.assertion: Warns that DoNotSign should only be used for testing, never in production
assertions.rationale: States 'Never disable signing in production environments'.

assertions.assertion: Shows how to set SigningBehavior on the SamlServiceProvider or as a default via options.Saml.DefaultSigningBehavior
assertions.rationale: Uses AddSaml(options => ...) lambda instead of the correct options.Saml.DefaultSigningBehavior path. Also uses wrong enum type 'SigningBehavior' instead of 'SamlSigningBehavior'.
